subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of the Messengers and Guide of the ways! I beseech Thee by the Name through which the sincere ones have soared in the atmosphere of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الرسل و هادی السبل اسئلک بالاسم الذی به طار المخلصون فی هواء محبتک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
